compiled_state.title: Remove --resume flag and references from sprint SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Remove all --resume references from plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md now that auto-detect resume handles this automatically:

1. Remove --resume from Usage block (line ~44): delete the line "/dso:sprint <epic-id> --resume  # Resume interrupted epic"
2. Remove --resume from Parse Arguments (line ~73): delete the bullet "- \`--resume\`: Resume interrupted primary ticket (skip to Phase 3 Batch Preparation)"
3. Remove the "If --resume Flag" section header (line ~303) — the checkpoint resume logic was already relocated to the auto-detect branch in Task 3. Remove the entire "### If --resume Flag" section (lines 303-316) since its content is now in the auto-detect path.
4. Update Phase 8 Graceful Shutdown resume command (line ~1818): change "/dso:sprint <epic-id> --resume" to "/dso:sprint <epic-id>" (auto-detect handles resume)

This is safeguard file plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md — task-level authorization granted by this task description.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] --resume no longer appears in sprint SKILL.md
  Verify: ! grep -q '\-\-resume' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
